name: ANALGESIC NEPHROPATHY
definition: renal damage from ingestion of salicylates in combination with phenacetin / acetaminophen in
dominant_finding: scarring of renal parenchyma ("wavy outline"); bilateral in 66%, unilateral in 5%
distribution: scarring of renal parenchyma ("wavy outline"); bilateral in 66%, unilateral in 5%
discriminating_features: scarring of renal parenchyma ("wavy outline"); bilateral in 66%, unilateral in 5%
papillary urothelial tumors in calices / pelvis (mostly TCC / squamous cell carcinoma), in 5%

general: scarring of renal parenchyma ("wavy outline"); bilateral in 66%, unilateral in 5%
